backend/main.mo: Defines actor state and types for shipments, invoices, clients, payments, accounts, sessions, OTP, and rate‑limiting with access control mixin and various in‑memory maps.
backend/migration.mo: Removes old adminPassword field during migration and returns an empty new actor state.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists summaries of multiple frontend files for documentation or build reference.
frontend/.env: Stores the Google Maps API key for frontend use.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base file defining light/dark theme CSS variables and core styles.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML document mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling landing page, tracking form, login flows, and lazy‑loaded dashboards.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminClien: Client detail view showing profile info and tabs for shipments and invoices.
Form for adding or updating a client profile, handling validation and submitting changes via mutation.
Dialog for creating and provisioning a new client account, validating principal IDs and generating a temporary password.
Displays a searchable list of client accounts with refresh and repair actions, allowing selection of a client.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminDashb: Main admin interface with tabs for clients, tracking, revenue, login history, and configuration, including logout and client tools.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGoogl: Panel to check, configure, and store the Google Geocoding API key with validation and status display.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminInvoi: Button that exports all invoices as a CSV file using a mutation and triggers a file download.
Displays and manages a client's invoices with create, update, and delete actions using query hooks and a dialog form.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Shows recent client login history with loading, error, and empty states using a table layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminMsg91: Provides UI to set and verify the MSG91 API key, showing storage status and handling save/verify actions.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReven: Fetches and displays revenue analytics over time using a line chart with loading, error, and empty fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminRoleM: Static panel indicating that role management is disabled under the current authentication mode.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminShipm: Lists and manages a client's shipments with create and delete functionality using a form dialog and query hooks.
frontend/src/components/AdminTrackingPan: Admin map panel that conditionally loads Google Maps and displays shipment markers.
frontend/src/components/app/AppErrorBoun: React error boundary that catches rendering errors and displays a UI with error details and actions to refresh or copy diagnostics.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access-denied message with a styled card and icon for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminBootst: Deprecated admin bootstrap UI card indicating Internet Identity-based setup is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminLoginC: Password-based admin login form with error handling and loading states using the admin session hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminLogout: Logout button for admin users that triggers logout and scrolls back to the home section.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Deprecated Internet Identity login component that returns null.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Deprecated profile setup dialog with a form, retained only for compatibility.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientDas: Client dashboard UI providing logout, support options, and tabs for viewing shipments and invoices.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientInv: Table for displaying client invoices with status badges, error states, and actions like PDF download or payment.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientPas: A form card allowing clients to change their temporary password with validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientPor: Provides tabbed login/signup UI and switches to login after successful signup.
Login card supporting password and OTP authentication with validation and query mutations.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientShi: Fetches and displays a client’s active and delivered shipments with authentication and error handling.
frontend/src/components/client/ClientSig: Signup form handling identifier validation, password checks, and account creation mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/ClientSessionProvider: Context provider managing client session tokens and authentication state in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminBootstrap.ts: React-query hooks for checking admin bootstrap status and triggering first-admin bootstrap via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminSession.ts: Manages admin authentication by storing, validating, and clearing admin tokens and handling admin login/logout via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClientSession.ts: Empty file placeholder for client session management.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for client signup, login, OTP operations, and related backend interactions with state updates and error handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind-based styles defining theme variables, dark mode, typography, and utility classes including custom gold branding.
frontend/src/lib/pdf/invoicePdf.ts: Generates a printable invoice PDF by opening a window with styled HTML and triggering the browser print dialog.
frontend/src/lib/shipmentsStorage.ts: Empty file placeholder for shipment storage utilities.
frontend/src/lib/types.ts: Declares local type definitions for user, client, and account status and re-exports backend shipment and invoice types.
frontend/src/lib/whatsapp.ts: Creates WhatsApp deep links for invoice reminders and support messages with formatted text and cleaned phone numbers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/utils/clientAuthErrors.ts: Maps various error formats to short user-facing authentication error messages.
frontend/src/utils/clientIdentifier.ts: Validates and normalizes email or 10‑digit mobile identifiers and returns structured results.
frontend/src/utils/queryErrorMessage.ts: Extracts readable React Query error messages, reusing auth error mapping and handling network/service issues.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Smoothly scrolls to a page section with a fixed header offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading URL params, persisting them in sessionStorage, and managing hash/query parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins.
project_state.json: Project state file describing issues and admin-authentication feature requests for backend fixes.
